objective: Confirm whether the exposed value is live or has release impact without using it against external services.
preconditions: Repository owner authorizes credential inventory.
Secret value is handled as confidential.
actions: Hash the suspected value and compare against known internal secret inventory.
Check commit history and package artifacts for spread.
Open a rotation ticket if the value resembles a production credential.
expected_signal: Credential is rotated or proven to be a non-secret placeholder.
stop_condition: Stop before external delivery, third-party targeting, production mutation, or privilege escalation outside the sandbox.
